allow: Bash(node -e "try { require\('electron-updater'\); console.log\('electron-updater: installed'\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('electron-updater: NOT installed'\) }")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('electron-builder in deps:', !!p.dependencies['electron-builder'] || !!p.devDependencies['electron-builder']\); console.log\('electron-forge in devDeps:', Object.keys\(p.devDependencies\).filter\(k=>k.includes\('forge'\)\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const lic=require\('./electron/license'\); console.log\('license.js loads OK, exports:', Object.keys\(lic\).join\(', '\)\)")
